top_signals.title: Oil Rises on Report of Fresh US Strikes With Hormuz Still Shut
top_signals.summary: Oil advanced, following a drop of more than 5% on Wednesday, as the US and Iran remained at odds over how to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and a report pointed to fresh military strikes in the Islamic Republic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
